summary: Multi-PR merge that landed a broad batch of small decompilations and one matching-status update. It implemented previously stubbed functions across Kirby special-N hat handling, common fighter death/rebirth logic, stage unlock notification, ARQ initialization, audio reset, THP movie header initialization, menu/name-entry helpers, trophy camera setup, and sysdolphin spline code. The most concrete project-level impact was moving sysdolphin/baselib/spline.c from NonMatching to Matching in configure.py, accompanied by scope/inline/static adjustments and sdata2 symbol normalization.
what_changed: Marked sysdolphin/baselib/spline.c as Matching in configure.py.
Changed spline sdata2 constants in config/GALE01/symbols.txt from named HSD_Spline_804DE620-style globals to compiler-style @13, @14, @15, @17, @18, @19, @80, @82, @91, @101, @178, and @179 labels.

Adjusted spline helper linkage and inlining: splGetCardinalPoint and splGetBezierPoint became inline, splGetBSplinePoint and splArcLengthPolynomial became static, splGetBSplinePoint was removed from spline.h, and spl_GetArcLengthDx was introduced.
Implemented Kirby special-N routines ftKb_SpecialN_800F10D4, ftKb_SpecialN_800F19AC, and ftKb_SpecialN_800F1A8C, including hat object allocation and switch dispatch by FighterKind.
Expanded ftCommon_MotionVars.unk_deadup layout by replacing part of pad_x48 with x4C, Vec3 x50, and Vec3 x5C fields used by the newly implemented dead-up fall physics.
Implemented ftCo_DeadUpFall_Phys and ftCo_800D5600 in ft_0D31.c, adding dependencies on ftanim, lbvector, and mpcoll and exposing fn_800D54A4 in ft_0D31.h.
Implemented gm_80164504 to map a stage id through Stage_8022519C and lbl_803B790C, notify via gmMainLib_8015D818, and set a bit in the stage unlock mask.
Implemented lbArq_80014D2C to initialize the ARQ global free-list/list array over nodes in lbArq_804316C0.
Implemented fn_800244F4 as an audio/global reset routine and corrected its prototype to void fn_800244F4(void), adding missing static/external globals in lbaudio_ax.static.h and calling gm_801603B0.
Implemented fn_8001EB14 for THP setup: THPInit, DVDConvertPathToEntrynum, lbFile_800161C4 header read, metadata field copies, warning OSReports, state initialization, and return 1.
Expanded THPDecComp in lbmthp.h with header fields, state fields, path entry number storage, and corrected fn_8001EB14 prototype.
Implemented menu/name-entry helpers fn_8024FC48, mn_802307F8, and mnNameNew_8023B224, with associated headers and includes.
Expanded TyCameraData_ and implemented un_80307828 for trophy/toy camera and light state reset plus HSD_CObjSetInterest.
smart_moves: For spline matching, the PR did not only alter C expression ordering; it also synchronized build metadata and symbols by changing configure.py to Matching and converting the affected sdata2 constants back to @ local labels.
Header prototypes were tightened from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to concrete signatures when functions were implemented, improving type propagation for later decompilation.
Struct padding was refined only around fields needed by implemented code, such as unk_deadup.x4C/x50/x5C and THPDecComp offsets, avoiding premature overnaming while enabling typed accesses.
The spline diff uses linkage and inline control as a matching lever: static for private helpers, inline for point evaluators, and removal of the now-private BSpline helper from the public header.

The Kirby hat implementation preserves matching-sensitive quirks such as #pragma dont_inline, PAD_STACK, explicit casts to FtPartsDesc and ftData_x8_x8, and the unusual Fighter* fp = fp = gobj->user_data pattern.
Several functions preserve control-flow shape with goto labels and explicit fallbacks, notably gm_80164504's found_stage/found_notify labels.
decomp_lessons: When a file becomes matching, update configure.py and the symbol map together; lingering hand-named constants can prevent or obscure a clean match.
Do not expose private helper functions in headers if the original code keeps them local; static/private scope can be part of the match.
Small helper extraction can be a matching tactic: spl_GetArcLengthDx isolates the midpoint dx computation so the surrounding register/codegen shape matches.
Union motion-var layouts should be refined from observed accesses rather than left as broad padding once physics code needs typed Vec3 and float fields.
Replacing UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS with concrete prototypes helps downstream files include the right headers and reduces accidental ABI ambiguity.
Menu and UI code often needs exact struct offsets for text handles and small u8 state fields; partial named structs with explicit padding are acceptable when evidence is offset-based.
For matching decompilation, preserve stack artifacts such as PAD_STACK and compiler pragmas when the diff shows they are needed.
naming_conventions: Address-based function names such as ftKb_SpecialN_800F10D4, gm_80164504, fn_800244F4, and un_80307828 were retained where no semantic name was established.
Unknown struct fields continue to use offset-style names such as x4C, x50, x5C, unk_128, and x58.
Compiler-generated/local constants in symbols.txt use @number labels rather than invented HSD_Spline_804DExxx global names when matching requires that representation.
Header declarations include address comments such as /* 0244F4 */ and /* 307828 */ alongside the concrete prototype.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used #pragma push / #pragma dont_inline on / #pragma pop around ftKb_SpecialN_800F10D4.
Used PAD_STACK in ftKb_SpecialN_800F10D4, lbArq_80014D2C, mnNameNew_8023B224, and un_80307828 to preserve stack shape.
Changed spline helper linkage/inlining to inline or static to match compiler output and public symbol expectations.
Introduced spl_GetArcLengthDx and reordered midpoint/dx temporaries in splArcLengthGetParameter to match generated code.
Used explicit pointer arithmetic and casts, e.g. (u8*) p_ftCommonData + 0x520 and THPDecComp field offsets, where full type information was not yet available.
Preserved goto-label control flow in gm_80164504 for stage and notification lookup.
Used explicit bit-shift form *stage_unlock_mask |= (1LL << (s32) unlock_idx), indicating matching-sensitive integer width/sign behavior.

Preserved grouped switch cases for Kirby copied fighter kinds, including shared Fox/Falco and Link/Young Link paths and the one-function difference between Mewtwo branches in ftKb_SpecialN_800F19AC and ftKb_SpecialN_800F1A8C.
review_feedback: No issue comments, review comments, or reviews were present in the provided PR context, so reviewer intent and requested changes are not evidenced.
follow_up_queries: Inspect PRs #2366, #2367, and #2368 individually for the original author intent and any review discussion hidden by this merge PR.
Search later PRs for THPDecComp field renames after fn_8001EB14 exposed the header/state layout.
Search later spline changes to confirm whether the @number sdata2 symbol naming remained stable after spline.c became matching.
Search later Kirby special-N work for semantic names for hat.x14, hat.x1C, hat.x24, fv.kb.x44, and related copied-special dispatch functions.
Search later ftCommon motion-var changes around unk_deadup to see whether x4C/x50/x5C gained names.
